  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The artifact makes precise technical claims—Bregman projection on the simplex, O(n log m) complexity, O(m log T / T) regret—whose internal consistency is central to any improvement of this draft; improving a mathematically grounded paper without checking logical and derivational coherence would leave the core value untouched.",
    "R1.6": "'Improve this draft' most directly invokes prose quality: sentence construction, paragraph cohesion, precision of technical language, and readability for the target audience are all load-bearing dimensions of improvement."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should the improvement be limited to prose clarity and writing quality, or should it also include scrutiny of the technical content—mathematical derivations, algorithmic complexity claims, and empirical benchmark numbers?"
}
